sentences.english: I've been thinking about changing careers.
I want to move from finance into UX design.
Have you taken any courses or done any projects in UX?
sentences.korean: UX 관련 강좌를 듣거나 프로젝트를 한 적 있어요?

sentences.english: I completed a certificate program online and built a portfolio with three case studies.
sentences.korean: 온라인 자격증 프로그램을 수료했고 세 가지 사례 연구로 포트폴리오를 만들었어요.

sentences.english: Your analytical skills from finance could actually be a huge advantage in UX research.
sentences.korean: 금융에서의 분석 능력이 UX 리서치에서 실제로 큰 장점이 될 수 있어요.

sentences.english: That's actually what I was hoping to leverage.
